uiBuilder.label: D3 Gantt Chart
uiBuilder.description: A configurable Gantt / timeline chart rendered with D3.js. Each task is a horizontal bar spanning its start and end dates, laid out over a time axis with optional gridlines, weekend shading, a today reference line, color-by-group with a legend, progress overlays, and labels. Restyle it entirely from the property panel and hook into click/hover events.

properties.name: data
properties.label: Data · Tasks
properties.description: Array of tasks, each: { id?, task, start, end, group?, color?, progress? }. 'start'/'end' are date strings ('YYYY-MM-DD' or ISO), Date objects, or epoch milliseconds. 'group' drives color-by-group and the legend; 'color' overrides the bar color; 'progress' is 0..1 (or 0..100). Tasks with missing/invalid start or end are dropped; if end < start they are swapped. Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the chart. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the chart title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the chart title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Chart background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border width in pixels.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Corner radius of the widget border, in pixels.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Minimum chart height in pixels. The chart grows taller when the number of task rows requires it.

properties.name: rowHeight
properties.label: Display · Row height (px)
properties.description: Height allotted to each task row (including the gap), in pixels.

properties.name: barPadding
properties.label: Display · Bar padding
properties.description: Vertical gap between bars as a fraction of the row height (0 = touching, 0.5 = half gap).

properties.name: barRadius
properties.label: Display · Bar corner radius (px)
properties.description: Corner radius of task bars, in pixels.

properties.name: barColor
properties.label: Display · Bar color
properties.description: Default bar color used when a task has no 'color' and no 'group' coloring applies.

properties.name: barOpacity
properties.label: Display · Bar opacity
properties.description: Fill opacity of task bars (0..1).

properties.name: showProgress
properties.label: Display · Show progress
properties.description: Draw a darker inner overlay spanning each task's 'progress' fraction.

properties.name: progressColor
properties.label: Display · Progress color
properties.description: Color of the progress overlay. Leave blank to use a darker shade of the bar color.

properties.name: groupBy
properties.label: Display · Color by group
properties.description: When tasks have a 'group', color bars by group (using the color scheme) and show a legend.

properties.name: showRowLabels
properties.label: Display · Show row labels
properties.description: Show each task name in a left gutter.

properties.name: rowLabelWidth
properties.label: Display · Row label width (px)
properties.description: Width reserved for the left row-label gutter, in pixels.

properties.name: rowLabelColor
properties.label: Display · Row label color
properties.description: Text color of the left row labels.

properties.name: showTaskLabels
properties.label: Display · Show task labels
properties.description: Render the task name on/next to each bar.

properties.name: labelPosition
properties.label: Display · Task label position
properties.description: Place task labels inside the bar or to the right of it.

properties.name: labelColor
properties.label: Display · Task label color
properties.description: Color of task labels (auto-contrasts when placed inside the bar).

properties.name: axisPosition
properties.label: Axis · Time axis position
properties.description: Where to draw the time axis.

properties.name: dateFormat
properties.label: Axis · Date format
properties.description: d3-time-format specifier for axis ticks and tooltip dates, e.g. "%b %-d" (Jun 3), "%m/%d", "%b %Y".

properties.name: showGridlines
properties.label: Axis · Show gridlines
properties.description: Draw vertical gridlines at the axis ticks.

properties.name: gridColor
properties.label: Axis · Gridline color
properties.description: Color of the vertical gridlines.

properties.name: showToday
properties.label: Axis · Show today line
properties.description: Draw a dashed reference line at today's date (or 'Today date' override).

properties.name: todayDate
properties.label: Axis · Today date
properties.description: Override for the 'today' reference line. Date string ('YYYY-MM-DD' or ISO). Leave blank to use the current date.

properties.name: todayColor
properties.label: Axis · Today line color
properties.description: Color of the today reference line.

properties.name: showWeekends
properties.label: Axis · Shade weekends
properties.description: Shade Saturday/Sunday columns with a light band.

properties.name: weekendColor
properties.label: Axis · Weekend shade color
properties.description: Fill color of the weekend shading bands.

properties.name: axisColor
properties.label: Axis · Line color
properties.description: Color of the axis line and ticks.

properties.name: axisTextColor
properties.label: Axis · Text color
properties.description: Color of axis tick labels.

properties.name: axisFontSize
properties.label: Axis · Font size
properties.description: Font size of axis tick labels, in pixels.

properties.name: useSeriesColors
properties.label: Colors · Use task colors
properties.description: Use each task's own 'color' when present (overrides group coloring for that task).

properties.name: colorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Color scheme
properties.description: Categorical palette used to color groups. 'custom' uses the Color palette below.

properties.name: colorPalette
properties.label: Colors · Custom palette
properties.description: Per-group colors used when Color scheme = Custom. Array of CSS color strings. (Default lives in index.js.)

properties.name: showLegend
properties.label: Legend · Show legend
properties.description: Show a legend of groups (when tasks have groups).

properties.name: legendPosition
properties.label: Legend · Position
properties.description: Where to place the group legend.

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Font family
properties.description: Base font for the chart. Leave blank to inherit.

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Animate bars growing in on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the grow-in animation, in milliseconds.

properties.name: animationEasing
properties.label: Display · Animation easing
properties.description: Easing curve for the grow-in animation.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Display · Hover highlight
properties.description: Outline the hovered task bar.

properties.name: hoverDimOthers
properties.label: Display · Dim others on hover
properties.description: Fade the other task bars while hovering one.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a tooltip on hover.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Template
properties.description: HTML template. Tokens: {task}, {group}, {start}, {end}, {duration} (days), {progress} (as %), {id}, {swatch}, {color}, plus any custom field on the task. All values are escaped except {swatch}.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the cursor; otherwise anchored above the bar.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background
properties.description: Tooltip background color.

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the chart background (not a specific task bar).

actions.name: TASK_CLICKED
actions.label: Task clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a task bar.

payload.name: start
payload.label: Start
payload.description: Formatted start date of the task.

payload.name: end
payload.label: End
payload.description: Formatted end date of the task.

actions.name: TASK_HOVERED
actions.label: Task hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a task bar. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.
